texto: If you judge everything by how photographically real it looks, then you're missing out on a lot of what art is about and what communication is. There are ambiguities in life, and that should be reflected in art, cinema, and storytelling, I think.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ben Wheatley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “If you judge everything by how photographically real it looks, then you're missing out on a lot o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, vida, art, útil em momentos de art e think.

texto: The reality of any location in Britain being used in a TV program of a film is that something bad is going to happen! That's the nature of drama. Most of the things that get made or basically grisly detective shows about murders, accidents or medical dramas.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Wheatley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The reality of any location in Britain being used in a TV program of a film is that something bad…” articula reflexao, nature, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reality e drama.
